variables.name: Focal length
variables.description: Distance from the center of the lens or mirror to the focal point (positive for converging systems such as convex lenses or concave mirrors).

variables.name: Magnification
variables.description: Ratio of image height to object height.

variables.name: Object distance
variables.description: Distance from the object to the center of the lens or mirror.

variables.name: Image distance
variables.description: Distance from the image to the center of the lens or mirror (positive for real images).
